301.reason: [Potential bug: if the inner while loop exits because j reaches fileLen (no star found), then j-- results in an index of fileLen-1, which may point to the last character of the file (not necessarily a star). The subsequent j++ in the outer loop would then advance to fileLen and exit, but the comment might be unterminated. Additionally, this logic can cause an infinite loop if the file ends with a star (e.g., "/*...*" without closing slash) because the condition "!isDivi(next_letter)" will never be true, and the inner while will always find a star at the end, leading to repeated decrements and increments without progress.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Potential bug: if the inner while loop exits because j reaches fileLen (no star found), then j-- results in an index of fileLen-1, which may point to the last character of the file (not necessarily a star). The subsequent j++ in the outer loop would then advance to fileLen and exit, but the comment might be unterminated. Additionally, this logic can cause an infinite loop if the file ends with a star (e.g., "/*...*" without closing slash) because the condition "!isDivi(next_letter)" will never be true, and the inner while will always find a star at the end, leading to repeated decrements and increments without progress.]

235.reason: Error: Should not add a token for an erroneous character; only record error and skip.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: Should not add a token for an erroneous character; only record error and skip.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly adds an AND token even when encountering a single '&' which is a lexical error; should not produce a token for invalid operator]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly adds an AND token even when encountering a single '&' which is a lexical error; should not generate a token for invalid single '&']

248.reason: Error: Same issue – token added erroneously.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: Same issue – token added erroneously.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly adds an OR token even when encountering a single '|' which is a lexical error; should not produce a token for invalid operator]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly adds an OR token even when encountering a single '|' which is a lexical error; should not generate a token for invalid single '|']

268.reason: [The loop condition lacks a boundary check (j < fileLen). If the source file ends with "//" and no trailing newline, j will increment past the string length, causing a StringIndexOutOfBoundsException.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The loop condition lacks a boundary check (j < fileLen). If the source file ends with "//" and no trailing newline, j will increment past the string length, causing a StringIndexOutOfBoundsException.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  Missing bounds check (j < fileLen), causing IndexOutOfBoundsException when a single-line comment appears at the end of the file without a trailing newline.
